cycle_0.name: Foundation
cycle_0.description: Monorepo scaffold, Docker Compose, CI/CD pipelines, design tokens, and database schema design.
notes: Switched from Railway to Render for backend hosting — documented in ADR-003.
setup.sh bootstrap script was not created (low priority, Docker Compose covers local dev).
ruff, mypy, ESLint all passing after CI/CD fixes on 2026-06-17.
Render deploy API fixed: clearCache uses string enum 'do_not_clear', not boolean.
mypy: added pydantic.mypy plugin and SQLModel model overrides for call-arg/misc errors.
database.py: engine now lazy-initialized to prevent import-time crash in CI.

cycle_1.name: Public Storefront MVP
cycle_1.description: Full UI kit, backend catalog API, authenticated sizing wizard, and beta deployment.
blocking_requirements: Product photography — min 3 images per product
Hero video — WebM + MP4, silent loop, < 8MB
Product copy and ISSF compliance documentation delivered

cycle_2.name: Transactional Platform (Public Launch)
cycle_2.description: Checkout, Stripe/Razorpay payments, manufacturing state machine, notifications, admin panel, and production go-live.
blocking_requirements: Cycle 1 complete with beta athlete feedback addressed
WhatsApp Business API token (or feature flagged off)

cycle_3.name: Scale, B2B & Intelligence
cycle_3.description: B2B partner portal, LangGraph AI sizing agent, GA4/Meta Pixel analytics, GDPR compliance, and technical blog.
blocking_requirements: Cycle 2 complete with revenue confirmed live
GA4 Measurement ID and Meta Pixel ID ready

required_before_cycle_2: Brevo API key + sender domain verified
WhatsApp Business API token or FEATURE_WHATSAPP_ENABLED=false
